skepticalReview.round1: rejected v3: false future registration, descriptive partitioning, non-reconstructible historical snapshot, unbound predicate and forcing set

skepticalReview.round4: accepted: closed structured operational census, exact review sampling, coherent transitions, total classification, forcing eligibility, versioned history, truthful chronology, and no v4 crawl evidence
